title: Warm Gooey French Chickpeas Madeleine
description: A cultured, gooey, show-off French dish featuring chickpeas, tandoor, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients in a madeleine form, perfect for a unique snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine chickpeas, olive oil, tandoor spice mix, lemon juice, and maple syrup, and blend until smooth.
In a separate bowl, whip the aquafaba until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold the aquafaba into the chickpea mixture until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the madeleine molds, filling them about 3/4 of the way full.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the molds for 5 minutes.
Transfer the madeleines to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
